title: Escape from Impel Down
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Blackbeard, Unknown person #1, Magellan, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Whitebeard, Blackbeard, Unknown person #1, Magellan, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of escape from impel down.

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: You people sure live on the edge.

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: You under- estimated Magellan too much....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: You coming to us here was fate.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Those who fear death are the losers!!

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Zehahaha!! You should live in the moment!!

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Ohh, Shiryuuuuuuu!! Thanks for saving us, man.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: I expelled the poison from my body

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: We broke out of prison!! Gyaha- haha!!

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Whitebeard, Blackbeard, Unknown person #1, Magellan, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of escape from impel down.
